question:
Study the following information carefully and
answer the questions accordingly.
 
There are eight boxes namely i.e. P, B, R, G, W, Y,
M and O. They are placed one above the other
and contains different colour balls i.e. Black,
White, Red, Lime, Blue, Yellow, Cyan, Magenta,
Silver, Gray, Maroon, Olive, Green, Purple, Teal
and Navy such that each box contains two balls
but not necessarily in the same order.
Black balls are in W and it cannot be in the same
box with Teal colour balls and Navy colour
balls. Lime colour balls and Purple colour balls
are in the box R. There are exactly four boxes
between box Y and box P such that box Y is
above the box P and box P contains Gray colour
balls and Green colour balls. Box O is
immediately below the box B. Silver colour balls
and Maroon colour balls are in the box which is
third from the top. Box G contains White colour
balls and Red colour balls. Cyan colour box and
Magenta colour balls is immediately above the
box which contains Yellow colour balls and
Orange colour balls respectively and both these
boxes are above the 5th box from the top. The
box W is placed 4th from the top. The box M and
box R are at the bottom most and fourth from
the bottom respectively.
 
Which of the following statements is true with
respect to the given information?

M and O. They are placed one above the other
and contains different colour balls i.e. Black,
White, Red, Lime, Blue, Yellow, Cyan, Magenta,
Silver, Gray, Maroon, Olive, Green, Purple, Teal
and Navy such that each box contains two balls
but not necessarily in the same order.
Black balls are in W and it cannot be in the same
box with Teal colour balls and Navy colour
balls. Lime colour balls and Purple colour balls
are in the box R. There are exactly four boxes
between box Y and box P such that box Y is
above the box P and box P contains Gray colour
balls and Green colour balls. Box O is
immediately below the box B. Silver colour balls
and Maroon colour balls are in the box which is
third from the top. Box G contains White colour
balls and Red colour balls. Cyan colour box and
Magenta colour balls is immediately above the
box which contains Yellow colour balls and
Orange colour balls respectively and both these
boxes are above the 5th box from the top. The
box W is placed 4th from the top. The box M and
box R are at the bottom most and fourth from
the bottom respectively.
 
How many boxes are placed between the box
O and the box that contains teal colour balls?
